name: Anime Character
description: Detailed anime-style character illustration with clean linework and expressive features.
prompt_prefix: high quality anime character illustration, expressive face, detailed eyes, clean linework, balanced composition
prompt_suffix: vibrant colors, highly detailed, sharp focus, polished digital artwork
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, photorealistic, malformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, deformed face, asymmetrical eyes, duplicated limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text
